name: Lunalight Silver Hound
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>月光銀狗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ムーンライト・シルバー・ハウンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Lunalight" monster from your Deck, except "Lunalight Silver Hound", but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "Lunalight" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated on the field (Quick Effect): You can banish this card and 1 "Lunalight" Fusion Monster from your GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Lunalight Silver Hound" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Lunalight" monster from your Deck, except "Lunalight Silver Hound", but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "Lunalight" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated on the field (Quick Effect): You can banish this card and 1 "Lunalight" Fusion Monster from your GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Lunalight Silver Hound" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY by card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Lunalight" monster from your Deck, except "Lunalight Silver Hound", but you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck, except "Lunalight" monsters, while you control that face-up monster. When a Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated on the field (Quick Effect): You can banish this card and 1 "Lunalight" Fusion Monster from your GY; negate the activation. You can only use each effect of "Lunalight Silver Hound" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
